overview.description: The Invesco 0-5 Yr US TIPS ETF (PBTP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of US Treasury inflation-protected securities with up to five years remaining to maturity. PBTP was launched on Sep 22, 2017 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE BofA U.S. Treasuries Inflation-Linked (0-5 Y)
